visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a large Costco logo overlay on top of a shopping cart moving through a warehouse aisle. A salmon fillet is visible inside the cart. The setting is a brightly lit warehouse with industrial shelving and fluorescent lights hanging from the ceiling. (2) A series of rapid cuts begins, showing various products on shelves. First, purple packs of toilet paper are shown in a high-angle shot, followed by clear plastic containers of almond cookies. Yellow and blue text overlays cover the center of the frame. (3) The camera moves to the refrigerated section, showcasing trays of red marbled beef and sliced pork in close-up. The lighting is cool and bright. A hand is briefly seen reaching for an item in the background. (4) Various snacks and household items like laundry detergent and Super Mario toys are presented in individual shots. Each shot features the product prominently in the center, with the busy store environment blurred in the background. (5) The final sequence shows rows of wine bottles and gift boxes on wooden shelves. The camera pans slightly across the bottles, reflecting the overhead lights on the glass surfaces before ending on a high-angle shot of more packaged goods.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 narrator's hands, 2 passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is only visible through their hands pushing the cart and occasionally pointing; they appear to be wearing a casual long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various aisles of a Costco warehouse store, characterized by high metal shelving stacked with bulk products, large price signs, and bright industrial lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic pop music featuring a strong 4/4 drum beat and bright synthesizer pads. A male voice immediately begins narrating in an excited, high-arousal tone with a very fast speech rate. The signal is crisp and professionally produced. (2) Every visual cut is punctuated by a short, high-frequency digital "whoosh" or "click" sound effect, marking rapid transitions. The narrator continuously lists products and prices without pauses, maintaining high intensity and clear articulation. The BGM remains steady in the background. (3) The vocal track features dynamic pitch intonations, rising on product names and falling on price points. The spectral brightness of the overall mix is high, with the vocals sitting prominently above the compressed background music. There is no significant ambient noise or environmental floor audible. (4) As the video nears its end, the BGM continues its repetitive, driving loop. The sound effects density remains high, perfectly synchronized with the rapid-fire visual montage of grocery items. The narrator's tone remains consistently enthusiastic and persuasive throughout the entire 90-second duration.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional weekly update for Costco members, highlighting specific discounted items available for the New Year period. It uses a high-speed montage and energetic narration to grab attention and provide a large volume of value information in a short time.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists specific product discounts at a named retailer (Costco) and encourages following for more updates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical social-media shopping guide using high information density and fast pacing to retain viewer engagement.
